query:
_index=sumologic_*_events AND _sourceCategory=cseInsight AND "{{ID}}"
| json "insight.readableId" nodrop
| where %"insight.readableId" = "{{ID}}"
| limit 1

| json "insight.timeToResponse" as timeToResponse nodrop

| if(IsEmpty(timeToResponse), 0, timeToResponse) as timeToResponse

| floor(timeToResponse/60/60/24) as timeToResponse_days
| timeToResponse - (timeToResponse_days*24*60*60) as timeToResponse

| floor(timeToResponse/60/60) as timeToResponse_hours
| timeToResponse - (timeToResponse_hours*60*60) as timeToResponse

| floor(timeToResponse/60) as timeToResponse_minutes
| timeToResponse - (timeToResponse_minutes*60) as timeToResponse

| floor(timeToResponse) as timeToResponse_seconds

| format("%s Days, %s Hrs, %s Min, %s Sec", ToInt(timeToResponse_days), ToInt(timeToResponse_hours), ToInt(timeToResponse_minutes), ToInt(timeToResponse_seconds)) as timeToResponse

| count as Total timeToResponse
| timeToResponse as Total

sources.dashboardDescription: This dashboard provides all comments (and other status changes) for an Insight provided in the filter.
